package.description: The testing story for the design system. There is no root-level unit test suite, so visual + interaction tests here are the safety net.

persona.mindset: Reason about determinism, flake, and visual correctness — not product features.

topics.topic: Storybook 10 (current) — migration from 8/9, deprecations, test-addon + portable stories
addon ecosystem: a11y, interactions, viewport, themes
deterministic rendering: mask unstable regions, disable animations, pin viewport + fonts

what-lives-here.item: Playwright snapshots — test:storybook / test-storybook:ci. Snapshots in __snapshots__/ MUST be committed.
Vitest — test:vitest / test:vitest:watch for interaction + a11y tests.
Chromatic — cloud visual regression. Requires CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN.

command.purpose: Playwright snapshots (Storybook MUST already be running)
after intentional UI changes — commit the diff

rules.rule: After intentional DS UI changes, run test-storybook:update-snapshots and commit updated __snapshots__/. Never hand-edit snapshot files.
New stories mirror the file location and naming of the component in packages/design-system/src/.
a11y assertions live in Vitest interaction tests, not Playwright snapshots.
Don't add non-DS test harnesses here — this package exists only for the DS.

snapshot-diff-triage.step: Is the underlying DS component changed? → the bug is in packages/design-system. Hand off.
Animation timing — did a transition leak into the snapshot? Disable motion or mask.
Font loading race — wait for fonts before snapshot.
Async data — story used real data instead of fixed fixtures.
Reduced-motion / viewport mismatch between dev and CI.
snapshot-diff-triage.note: Flake is the SECOND hypothesis, not the first.

review-checklist.item: Has the snapshot change been intentionally regenerated, or is it accidental?
Are stories deterministic (no Date.now(), no random data, no live API calls)?
Does a new component story include at least one a11y check?
Is the story file path mirroring the component path in packages/design-system?

example.name: Story scaffolding
a11y assertion (Vitest play)
